chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3854 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.17177/2019 2. For hearing of main case 27.01.2025 Mr. Umer Ilyas advocate holds brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this petition may be disposed off with directions that department may undertake to finalize the assessment order after providing an opportunity of hearing and pending such adjudication no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Order accordingly. Petition is disposed off as aforesaid. Judge Judge Amjad
